name: The Great Flood
description:
Water.

Something everyone needs to live. Yet also something that can easily kill.

Imagine our world, many years forward from now, after the uncontrollable rising of temperature, be completely flooded with water, not even a bit of land above it.

And you, one of the people to be born and grow up on a floating city, built by what remained of the previous civilization.

Some yapping from the author.

I am just hella bored right now, so using my free time I will be creating random bots every now and then. So ye, have fun I guess. This one specifically is an original idea of mine, so if there is anything similar out there, it's just a lucky coincidence.

On a side note too, you can give me some requests in the comments, but do know that I will most likely not make any smut bots, you freaky goobers.
creator: MorkiYT
